    edu.txst.midterm - package edu.txst.midterm
     

    G

    GameEngine - Class in edu.txst.midterm
    Manages the game logic for the maze, including player movement, coin collection, step tracking, and win detection.
    GameEngine(Board) - Constructor for class edu.txst.midterm.GameEngine
    Constructs a GameEngine for the given board.
    getCell(int, int) - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.Board
     
    getCoins() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.GameEngine
    Returns the total number of coins collected by the player.
    getSteps() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.GameEngine
    Returns the total number of steps taken by the player.
    getSteps() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.StepCounter

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class edu.txst.midterm.MazeGUI
    Entry point for the application.
    MazeGUI - Class in edu.txst.midterm
    Main GUI window for the 16-Bit Maze game.
    MazeGUI() - Constructor for class edu.txst.midterm.MazeGUI
    Constructs the main game window, initializes UI components, and registers keyboard listeners for player movement.
    movePlayer(int, int) - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.GameEngine
    Attempts to move the player in the given direction.

    P

    playerWins() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.GameEngine
    Checks whether the player has reached the exit.
